audit_items.proof_trace: Line 353 (`s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp`) is the only code path that constitutes an auction start and it unconditionally assigns `block.timestamp` before emitting `AuctionStarted`. The alternative branch (`asset == s_assetOut`) transfers tokens without starting any auction and therefore is not subject to the post-condition. Transaction atomicity ensures that if `_onAuctionStart` reverts, no state is persisted.
